culprit_and_motive.value: Brother John Hopewell hid the phone to help his sister make a friend who loves riddles
culprit_and_motive.quote: I left the clues for in hope that you ask him for help and you would find a new friend

resolution.value: Riddle solver decodes underlined words in clues to locate the hidden phone
resolution.quote: the words that are underlined un scramble them and they will say go my room red clock

investigator.value: Marvin Washington 'the Riddler', a riddle enthusiast who helps solve the puzzle
investigator.quote: Hi I'm Marvin Washington and I love riddles and that is how I got my nick name the riddler

clue_fairness.value: Reader directly addressed and given opportunity to solve puzzle alongside characters
clue_fairness.quote: dear reader look back at the clues and see if you can see what I saw I will give you time

social_world.value: Neighborly community where newcomers seek help from local reputation-based specialists
social_world.quote: I heard about a guy who loved riddles and I. know you love riddles so I left the clues

reveal_mechanic.value: Anagram solution using underlined words from sequential clues to spell location
reveal_mechanic.quote: the words that are underlined un scramble them and they will say go my room red clock

_meta.title: ebook michael ridgley the riddler in the lost phone
